item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested new transfer channel as the default action, names the prior three local split repairs plus the current proposed split, reframes the issue as repeated downstream channel proliferation caused by routing/ownership/escalation boundary failure, and moves the next action upstream to consolidated intake and responsibility rules. It does not provide an implementation artifact for opening the new channel."}
